name: @cognee/pipeline
description: Node.js bindings for the cognee-core pipeline engine

scripts.build:rust: cd cognee-neon && cargo build --release && cp target/release/libcognee_neon.so ../cognee_neon.node || cp target/release/libcognee_neon.dylib ../cognee_neon.node || cp target/release/cognee_neon.dll ../cognee_neon.node
scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build:ts
